title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google DeepMind's Science Skills is an agentic workbench that orchestrates frontier models and integrates access to over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. It accelerates research by enabling agents to design experiments from genetic variants to wet-lab testing in minutes.
